parity_rule: strict TC4 1.7.10 parity; Forge 1.19.2 adapters must preserve original data and behavior contracts
changes: Added TC4InfusionStabilityParity as the shared stabilizer/symmetry bridge for infusion altar and matrix runtime.
Infusion Matrix now snapshots stabilizer signature, symmetry penalty, mirrored pairs and unpaired stabilizers into original-style NBT keys.
Running infusion re-checks stabilizer/symmetry drift and may only raise/keep instability; it does not silently lower risk mid-craft.
MatrixAuxiliaryReport now carries unpaired stabilizer penalty and stabilizer signature instead of a flat stabilizer count.
Arcane Workbench direct craft path now preserves container items through consumeSlotPreservingContainer, matching output slot craft behavior.
Aura Node HUD/renderer share modifier frame offsets and alpha rules through TC4AuraNodeHudParity.
Thaumometer Aura Node scan text now uses TC4AuraNodeScanParity and the original ConfigBlocks.blockAiry scan trigger key.
not_done_yet: Infusion Matrix still needs deeper failure event parity, stabilizer item whitelist verification against original code, and full FX packet sweep.
Arcane Workbench still needs exact mouse/hover/sound parity and remaining recipe edge cases.
Aura Node HUD and world renderer still need pixel/alpha verification against TC4 screenshots and exact node modifier animation timing.
Thaumometer scan GUI is still an adapter; full original overlay timing/zoom behavior is not complete.
